title: Survival Reimagined (NeoForge)
description: A Minecraft Mod with the goal of making Minecraft harder with a more realistic approach at progression
body:
![da title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9daa835949df4841788460f77c2fb3111b85d6c.png)


## Introduction

Start with flint, sticks and stones and progress to bronze, steel then all the way to diamond.
Monitor hunger better as it drains quicker based on your activities, Stay out of darkness and stay indoors during a Bloodmoon. Don't let your meat get spoil!

For Neoforge 1.21.1 **ONLY**!

This mod is **best paired** with optional but recommended following mods:
- [Tough as Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails)
- [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)

Recommended to view the mods advancement tree for progression!

## QnA

This mod will not be back ported to older Minecraft verions. Other loader versions will be attempted.

**Fabric Version is in development**

Bugs are to be expected as new features are added so please report them to the github page.
